prose.title: 25d mos
prose.body: The 25D Military Occupational Specialty (MOS) is a Signal Cyber Electromagnetic Activities (CEMA) Technician. These technicians are responsible for managing the planning and execution of intelligence operations related to signals, cyber, and electromagnetic activities. They are trained to conduct analysis and provide technical expertise on matters related to signals intelligence and electronic warfare. Additionally, they are responsible for the installation and maintenance of signal intelligence equipment and systems.
